fragments.plaintext:
The next generation of Air technology arrives March 26.

The Nike Air Max Dn boasts a Dynamic Air unit that allows pressurized Air to move with your foot, giving you an unreal, reactive sensation with every step. AirMaxDn

caption.text:
The next generation of Air technology arrives March 26.

The Nike Air Max Dn boasts a Dynamic Air unit that allows pressurized Air to move with your foot, giving you an unreal, reactive sensation with every step. AirMaxDn

fragments.plaintext: Pressurized air moves through the dual-chambered Air unit of the Nike Air Max Dn, giving you a smooth sensation as you take each step.

caption.text: Pressurized air moves through the dual-chambered Air unit of the Nike Air Max Dn, giving you a smooth sensation as you take each step.

fragments.plaintext:
Grand Slam secured 🔒 
  
Congratulations to the legendary Diede de Groot on your 21st Grand Slam and @tokitooda on adding your first title in Melbourne to the trophy case. 🏆
